title: Crispy Crumble-Topped Salmon
description: A simple yet flavorful salmon dish, perfect for a festive dinner. The crumble topping adds a sweet and crunchy texture.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the salmon fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
In a bowl, mix together the crumble mix, sour cream, and sugar.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the salmon fillets.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the salmon is cooked through and the topping is golden brown.
